title: Melted Almond Spanish Toast
description: A quick and floral keto-friendly breakfast dish featuring toasted bread with a gooey almond mixture drizzled on top for added sweetness.

ingredients.name: Almond extract or vanilla extract (for flavoring)

instructions: Spread powdered sugar over the top of each slice of toast.
Mix ground almonds with a small amount of almond extract or vanilla extract for an extra floral touch. Spread this mixture evenly on top of each piece of toasted bread.
Place the toasts in the preheated oven and bake for about 5 minutes, or until the almonds start melting into a gooey layer over the toast.
Remove from the oven when it reaches your desired consistency. Serve immediately while warm.
